AdditionalDropItemNumWhenPlayerKillingIn.description: When bAdditionalDropItemWhenPlayerKillingInPvPMode is enabled, the quantity of the item to drop.

AdditionalDropItemWhenPlayerKillingInPvP.description: When bAdditionalDropItemWhenPlayerKillingInPvPMode is enabled, the ID of the item to drop.

AdminPassword.description: Password used to obtain administrative privileges on the server.

AllowConnectPlatform.description: Not available in this version. Use CrossplayPlatforms instead.

AutoResetGuildTimeNoOnlinePlayers.description: Offline duration before bAutoResetGuildNoOnlinePlayers triggers. Ignored if bAutoResetGuildNoOnlinePlayers is False.

BaseCampMaxNum.description: Total number of bases across the server.

BaseCampMaxNumInGuild.description: Maximum number of bases per guild. Default: 4 (max 10).Increasing this value raises processing load.

BaseCampWorkerMaxNum.description: Maximum number of Pals per base (max 50).Increasing this value raises processing load.

BlockRespawnTime.description: Cooldown before you can respawn after death (seconds).

ChatPostLimitPerMinute.description: Maximum number of chat messages allowed per minute.

CrossplayPlatforms.description: Allowed platform to connect the server. Default: (Steam,Xbox,PS5,Mac)

DeathPenalty.description: Death PenaltyNone : No drops, Item : Drop all items except equipment, ItemAndEquipment : Drop all items, All : Drop all items and all Pals on team

DenyTechnologyList.description: Disable specific technologies.Specify Technology IDs .Example: DenyTechnologyList=(""PALBOX"", ""RepairBench""))

ItemContainerForceMarkDirtyInterval.description: How often to force re-sync while a container UI is open (seconds).

MonsterFarmActionSpeedRate.description: Item production speed multiplier from grazing.

PalAutoHpRegeneRateInSleep.description: Pal HP regen while sleeping (in Palbox) multiplier.

PalEggDefaultHatchingTime.description: Time to hatch a Huge Egg (hours). Note: Other eggs also require time to incubate.

PhysicsActiveDropItemMaxNum.description: Maximum number of dropped items that can use physics behavior.

PlayerAutoHpRegeneRateInSleep.description: Player HP regen while sleeping multiplier.

PublicIP.description: (Community server) Explicitly specify the external public IP.

PublicPort.description: (Community server) Explicitly specify the external public port. (Does not change the server’s listening port.)

RESTAPIPort.description: Listening port for the REST API.

RandomizerSeed.description: Seed value used when Pal spawn randomization mode is enabled.

RandomizerType.description: Pal spawn randomization mode:None = no randomization; Region = randomize per region; All = fully randomized.

RespawnPenaltyDurationThreshold.description: Survival-time threshold (seconds) for applying the respawn cooldown multiplier set by RespawnPenaltyTimeScale on a subsequent death.

RespawnPenaltyTimeScale.description: Multiplier applied to the respawn cooldown.

ServerPassword.description: Password required to log in to the server.

ServerPlayerMaxNum.description: Maximum number of players who can join the server.

ServerReplicatePawnCullDistance.description: Pal sync distance from players (cm). Minimum 5000 – maximum 15000.

VoiceChatMaxVolumeDistance.description: Distance at which voice chat volume does not attenuate.

VoiceChatZeroVolumeDistance.description: Distance at which voice chat volume becomes zero.

bAdditionalDropItemWhenPlayerKillingInPv.description: Whether to drop a special item when a player is killed while PvP is enabled.

bAllowClientMod.description: Allow players with mods enabled to join the server.

bAllowEnhanceStat_Attack.description: Allow allocating stat points to Attack.

bAllowEnhanceStat_Health.description: Allow allocating stat points to HP.

bAllowEnhanceStat_Stamina.description: Allow allocating stat points to Stamina.

bAllowEnhanceStat_Weight.description: Allow allocating stat points to Carry Weight.

bAllowEnhanceStat_WorkSpeed.description: Allow allocating stat points to Work Speed.

bAllowGlobalPalboxExport.description: Allow saving to the Global Palbox.

bAllowGlobalPalboxImport.description: Allow loading from the Global Palbox.

bAutoResetGuildNoOnlinePlayers.description: If no guild members log in, automatically delete structures and base Pals.

bBuildAreaLimit.description: Prevent building near structures such as fast-travel points.

bCharacterRecreateInHardcore.description: Whether you may recreate your character upon death in Hardcore mode.

bDisplayPvPItemNumOnWorldMap_BaseCamp.description: Whether to show, on the map, the number of PvP-exclusive items in each base.

bDisplayPvPItemNumOnWorldMap_Player.description: Whether to show player locations and the number of PvP-exclusive items on the map.

bEnableBuildingPlayerUIdDisplay.description: Whether to display the creator’s player ID on structures.

bEnableFastTravelOnlyBaseCamp.description: Restrict fast travel to between bases only.

bExistPlayerAfterLogout.description: Whether players enter a sleeping state at their current location when logging out.

bHardcore.description: Enable Hardcore. You will not be able to respawn on death.

bIsRandomizerPalLevelRandom.description: If true, wild Pal levels are fully random. If false, levels are randomized within each area’s intended range.

bIsShowJoinLeftMessage.description: On dedicated servers, show in-game messages when players join/leave.

bIsStartLocationSelectByMap.description: Whether to allow players to choose their starting location.

bIsUseBackupSaveData.description: Enable world backups.Enabling this increases disk load.

bShowPlayerList.description: Enable the player list on the ESC menu.
